opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Every time I walk to the letterbox, my calves cramp up so painfully I have to stop and rest for five minutes before I can move.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The cramping in my legs has got a lot worse this past week and now it happens after just a short walk — I'm scared to leave the house.

symptom_narrative.onset: started gradually about 6 months ago and has got much worse over the last week
symptom_narrative.duration: 6 months, sharply worse in the past 7 days
symptom_narrative.character: a tight, crampy pain in both calves that comes on when I walk
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: bad enough that I have to stop and stand still until it eases off
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: comes on after walking about 50 metres, every time, and settles after 5 to 10 minutes of resting
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: stopping and standing still for a few minutes — it goes away completely
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: walking, even a short distance to the letterbox
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no chest pain, no pins and needles, no back pain — just the leg cramps
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before it started 6 months ago; it has been slowly building and then jumped this week
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: my walking is really limited now and I'm frightened to go out in case I get stuck

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I don't really know — I've avoided doctors for years and haven't been told I have anything

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: I don't move around much and I mostly eat quick, packaged meals
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone and manages independently, but the leg pain is making that hard now

access_barriers.other: has avoided medical care for years; low engagement with health services

objective_data_offered.value: yellowish, slightly raised patches on both eyelids
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-described / video appearance only; not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: a greyish-white ring around the coloured part of both eyes
about 90 kg, and I'd say I'm overweight
when I'm resting my feet look a normal colour and they're not cold or numb
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-observation at rest; cannot substitute for a pulse examination
